overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption showing a cowboy riding a black horse through a desert canyon at sunset. The player overtakes a wooden wagon and rides toward distinctive red rock formations as the location name 'Diez Coronas' appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail with steep rock walls

events.description: overtaking a wooden horse-drawn wagon traveling in the same direction on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: galloping on horseback through the winding canyon trail, approaching and passing a wagon

notable_agents.action: wooden wagon with horses traveling in the same direction, being overtaken by the player

entered.detail: steep layered rock cliff face forming the canyon boundary
rocky hillside with sparse desert vegetation
sandy dirt path winding through the canyon floor
tall red rock formation visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy on horseback galloping through a desert canyon at dusk. The trail winds between steep rock walls while sparse desert vegetation dots the landscape. Around 8.5 seconds, the player overtakes a wooden wagon on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon approach to large rock monolith

agents.ego_description: maintaining a steady gallop along the canyon trail toward the prominent rock formations ahead

entered.detail: tall isolated red rock pillar rising from the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The horse continues galloping as the canyon opens up, with the right cliff wall falling behind. A prominent red rock monolith becomes visible in the center distance and gradually grows larger as the player approaches. The trail remains sandy with scattered desert scrub on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: Diez Coronas region with distinctive buttes

events.description: location name text 'Diez Coronas' appears at the top center of the screen

agents.ego_description: riding toward and passing the large monolith rock formation on the right

segments.scene_description: As the sky darkens further into dusk, the text 'Diez Coronas' appears identifying the region. The player rides past the prominent monolith which moves to the right side and recedes behind. The trail continues toward additional rock formations visible in the distance as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually opens into a vast landscape of red rock monoliths at dusk. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy galloping along a winding trail between steep rock walls, overtaking a wooden wagon on the right side of the path. As the horse continues forward, the canyon walls recede to the left, revealing a prominent red rock monolith that grows larger in the center distance. The scene then shifts as the sky darkens and the text Diez Coronas appears on screen, with the camera riding past the monolith as it slides to the right. Finally, the trail extends further into the desert, heading toward additional distant rock formations under the fading light.
